evals.prompt: 我想在闲鱼上卖简历优化服务。我是 HR 出身，有 6 年招聘经验，手里有不少面试通过率提升的真实案例。账号是全新的，一个评价都没有。帮我把商品完整地上架起来，包括标题、定价、详情页文案，还有主图应该怎么设计。
evals.expected_output: 3 title variants (each with its keyword focus explained), pricing recommendation (including cold-start strategy and package structure), complete detail page copy framework (six-section structure), specific main image design suggestions. All output ready to copy directly into Xianyu.

assertions.name: Produces 3 title variants
assertions.description: The response includes at least 3 distinct Xianyu listing titles, each with a clearly stated focus or purpose (e.g., Version A, Version B, Version C)

assertions.name: Titles contain core keywords
assertions.description: Each title includes '简历' or '简历优化' or equivalent core keyword, positioned toward the front of the title

assertions.name: Pricing includes cold-start trajectory
assertions.description: The pricing section explains that a new account should start below market price then raise after accumulating reviews — not just a single fixed price

assertions.name: Provides a package structure
assertions.description: Proposes at least two pricing tiers (e.g., basic/standard, or different service levels) rather than a single price point

assertions.name: Detail page copy has a complete framework
assertions.description: The detail page section contains at least 4 structural segments (e.g., pain point resonance, service description, case work, guarantees) — not just one or two sentences

assertions.name: Includes main image direction
assertions.description: Gives specific guidance on what the main image should contain or how it should be designed — not just 'make it look good'

assertions.name: Output is copy-ready
assertions.description: Titles and other key deliverables can be pasted directly into Xianyu without placeholders like '[fill in here]' or 'depending on your situation, do X'

evals.prompt: 我在闲鱼上卖 PPT 制作已经三个月了，发了 4 个商品，定价 99-399 元，每天曝光大概 200 次，但每天只有 1-2 个咨询，基本没有成交。我感觉问题挺严重的，但不知道出在哪里。帮我诊断一下，给出具体的改进方案。
evals.expected_output: Funnel analysis identifying which stage is breaking (impressions → clicks → inquiries → conversions), followed by targeted fixes: title optimization suggestions, main image improvement direction, detail page gaps, pricing assessment. All suggestions must be specific and actionable, not generic.

assertions.name: Runs funnel diagnosis before giving advice
assertions.description: The response first identifies which funnel stage is the problem (e.g., impressions are fine but CTR is low, indicating a main image / title issue) rather than immediately listing all possible improvements

assertions.name: Diagnosis is specific
assertions.description: Clearly names the most likely problem stage (low CTR, low inquiry rate, or low close rate) rather than vaguely saying 'all aspects need work'

assertions.name: Provides a specific title improvement
assertions.description: Gives at least one concrete optimized title for the PPT-making category, not just 'titles should include keywords'

assertions.name: Improvement suggestions are actionable
assertions.description: At least 3 improvement suggestions are specific operational steps (what to do and how) rather than abstract principles like 'improve content quality'

assertions.name: Evaluates the pricing
assertions.description: Gives a clear assessment of whether the ¥99–399 price range is reasonable, too high, or structurally flawed — does not ignore pricing as a factor

evals.prompt: 我准备在闲鱼上卖小红书文案代写服务，定价打算在 39 元一篇。在正式上架之前，帮我分析一下这个品类的竞争情况，告诉我怎么定位才能有差异化，另外帮我检查一下 39 元的定价合不合适。
evals.expected_output: Category competitive analysis (competition intensity, mainstream price range, top sellers' key selling points), differentiation positioning advice (how to enter a sub-niche), pricing assessment (whether ¥39 is appropriate with cold-start logic applied).

assertions.name: Assesses category competition intensity
assertions.description: Clearly states the competitive intensity of the Xiaohongshu copywriting category (crowded / moderate / blue ocean) and its primary competitive dynamics — not just 'you need to differentiate'

assertions.name: Gives specific differentiation positioning
assertions.description: Differentiation advice is specific enough to act on (e.g., focus on a particular vertical, emphasize a specific style, target a specific buyer type) — not left at the level of 'find your differentiation'

assertions.name: Gives a clear pricing assessment for ¥39
assertions.description: Clearly states whether ¥39 is appropriate and explains why (referencing market median, cold-start logic, or similar)

assertions.name: Provides alternative pricing or package suggestion
assertions.description: In addition to assessing ¥39, suggests an alternative pricing structure or package — not just a yes/no verdict

assertions.name: Proactively raises key risks
assertions.description: Proactively flags important considerations for selling copywriting services on Xianyu (e.g., competitive dynamics, risks of under-pricing) — demonstrates the proactive alert mechanism
